data.body:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] 5 new test functions exist in test_fix_bug_skill.py
  Verify: grep -c 'def test_fix_bug_skill_llm_behavioral\|def test_fix_bug_skill_hard_gate_llm\|def test_fix_bug_skill_step5_llm\|def test_fix_bug_skill_bot_psychologist\|def test_fix_bug_skill_llm_behavioral_subagent' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test_fix_bug_skill.py | awk '{exit ($1 < 5)}'
- [ ] New tests fail (RED)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && poetry run pytest tests/skills/test_fix_bug_skill.py -k 'llm_behavioral or bot_psychologist' --tb=no -q 2>&1; test $? -ne 0

## Test Functions
1. test_fix_bug_skill_llm_behavioral_classification — dual-signal: ticket content AND file type
2. test_fix_bug_skill_hard_gate_llm_behavioral — HARD-GATE amendment
3. test_fix_bug_skill_step5_llm_behavioral_exemption — Step 5/5.5 exemption
4. test_fix_bug_skill_bot_psychologist_dispatch — bot-psychologist routing reference
5. test_fix_bug_skill_llm_behavioral_subagent_guard — Agent tool availability check with inline-read fallback
